When an outlaw (Lee Marvin) with a fake nose kills her father, a schoolmarm (Jane Fonda) hires his drunken twin to get revenge.
programme.title: Cat Ballou

programme.desc: A busboy is embraced by the beatnik art community when he develops an impressive but morbid method of sculpturing.
programme.title: A Bucket of Blood

programme.desc: A policeman's efforts to curb illegal hot rodders backfire when an auto crash claims the life of a racer's brother.
programme.title: Hot Rod Girl

programme.desc: When former business partners Dean and Jerry enlist in the Army, they have different ambitions. Martin wants to see action. Klutzy Lewis wants to stay out of combat. They both have to deal with stern Army personnel while preparing for a variety show.
programme.title: At War With the Army

programme.desc: An ex-convict (John Payne) is framed for a bank holdup done by a police captain (Preston Foster) and men wearing masks.
programme.title: Kansas City Confidential

programme.desc: The frontiersman (Bruce Bennett) leads settlers to Kentucky, where he makes peace with a Shawnee chief (Lon Chaney).
programme.title: Daniel Boone, Trail Blazer

programme.desc: A cattle baron (John Wayne) tries to tame his wife (Maureen O'Hara) amid a feud with settlers and trouble with Indians.
programme.title: McLintock!

programme.desc: During the Civil War, reports of a sea monster attacking ships alarm the Navy. An investigation finds the monster is a submarine, the "Nautilus," commanded by vengeance-seeking Capt. Nemo (Allen Holubar), who was once an Indian prince.
programme.title: 20,000 Leagues Under the Sea

programme.desc: After returning to Hawaii from being in the army, a pineapple tycoon's rebellious son turns into an island tour guide with his girlfriend.
programme.title: Blue Hawaii

programme.desc: A reporter hears how an ex-convict (James Caan) and an Indian woman (Stefanie Powers) destroyed an Old West town overnight.
programme.title: Gone With the West

programme.desc: A secret agent blocks a villain's helio-beam plot in the second of four Matt Helm movies.
programme.title: Murderers' Row

programme.desc: While a Japanese attack on Pearl Harbor looms, an Army sergeant (Burt Lancaster), a former boxer (Montgomery Clift) and an officer's wife (Deborah Kerr) become entangled with others at an Army base on Oahu.
programme.title: From Here to Eternity

programme.desc: A chorus girl (Vera-Ellen) stars in a broke producer's (Cesar Romero) show after rumors link her with a millionaire (David Niven) in Scotland.
programme.title: Happy Go Lovely

programme.desc: Oscar-winning adaptation of the Broadway hit about an English professor (Rex Harrison) who teaches a cockney merchant (Audrey Hepburn) to be a lady.
programme.title: My Fair Lady

programme.desc: A doctor (John Forsythe) sets an expiration date with a rich patient's (Richard Kiley) wife (Reta Shaw).
programme.title: Murder Once Removed

programme.desc: Friends (Guy Madison, Kim Novak, Brian Keith) join a college student's scheme to rob a Reno casino for kicks.
programme.title: 5 Against the House

programme.desc: A New Yorker and her four sons experience love and laughter from their opinionated but well-meaning family patriarch.
programme.title: Life With Father

programme.desc: Gentle Dr. Jekyll (Spencer Tracy) tests a serum on himself, releasing vicious alter-ego Mr. Hyde on 19th-century London. Prowling the town, Hyde ventures to a music hall and encounters Ivy (Ingrid Bergman), whom he takes forcibly as his mistress.
programme.title: Dr. Jekyll and Mr. Hyde

programme.desc: After being shot in a gunfight, Hopalong Cassidy sets out to settle the war between cattlemen who each accuse the other of stealing their livestock.
programme.title: Hopalong Cassidy Enters

programme.desc: A folksy New England poet (Gary Cooper) inherits $20 million he doesn't want and tells a New York newswoman (Jean Arthur) why.
programme.title: Mr. Deeds Goes to Town

programme.desc: In a society where life ends at age 30, a law enforcement officer known as a Sandman (Michael York) flees with another 30-year-old (Jenny Agutter) when he learns his number has come up prematurely.
programme.title: Logan's Run

S01 E79 — Grappling With Emotion A man and woman are caught with drugs and prostitution activity and pull a knife on cops when they arrive; a K-9 unit stops a man who tries to run after crashing a stolen car; two women are found with drug paraphernalia and pills.
programme.title: Cops Reloaded

programme.desc: S01 E80 — Killer Roommate Cops get a call for an accidental shooting, but when they arrive at the scene and see a deceased man, evidence points to foul play; a man is arrested in an undercover drug deal and prostitution solicitation; a traffic stop.
programme.title: Cops Reloaded

programme.desc: S01 E81 — Busted at Local Watering Hole Cops chase after two males in an SUV until it flips; a domestic disturbance call is made involving a child custody dispute; officers detain and tase a fleeing suspect for selling heroin.
programme.title: Cops Reloaded

programme.desc: S01 E82 — Florida Style Officers stop a man on a bike who matches the description of a robbery suspect, the man runs until he falls and is arrested; three men are detained when found hanging out in a heavy drug alley; a boyfriend is arrested for pushing his girlfriend.
programme.title: Cops Reloaded

programme.desc: S01 E83 — Pop the Trunk Officers find a man in someone else's home who is wanted for domestic violence restraining order and a burglary; a man tries to swallow a bag of weed as he is pulled over; a woman stabs another man in the arm with scissors and is arrested.
programme.title: Cops Reloaded

programme.desc: S01 E84 — Zig Zaging Police ask a man to step out of his car when they spot marijuana, when he does, he run and hides under a car and is held at gunpoint until he comes out; a female is detained for stabbing a man with scissors and drug possession.
programme.title: Cops Reloaded

programme.desc: S01 E85 — Preowned Pants Officers chase after a stolen vehicle until the operator clips the side of a taxi, wraps around a steel pole and is taken into custody; an undercover cop poses as a prostitute and arrests every man who is soliciting sex.
programme.title: Cops Reloaded

programme.title: Cops Reloaded

programme.title: Cops Reloaded

programme.title: The Place For Miracles

programme.title: Believer’s Voice of Victory
programme.desc: KCMis committed to keeping the Word of God before your eyes—teaching you how tolive victoriously—so that you are rooted and grounded enough to overcome yourown adversity, reach out to others and share those same principles. We endeavorto bring believers from the milk to the meat of the Word, and into fullmaturity in their walk with God. Oneword from God has transformed the lives of thousands who dared to hear andbelieve. And one word from God will do the same for you.

programme.title: Paula Today with Paula Whie-Cain
programme.desc: Paula White-Cain along with her husband, Jonathan Cain discuss real life situations and offer practical, Biblical solutions. Down-to-earth, refreshing, sometimes unfiltered and always sharing the life-changing love of Jesus thru Paula’s in-depth teaching or Jon’s anointed music.

programme.title: Make Your Day Count with Lindsay Roberts
programme.desc: Lindsay Roberts hosts an uplifting program geared especially toward encouraging and equipping women through Bible-based teaching and testimonies.

programme.title: Believer's Voice of Victory
programme.desc: KCM is committed to keeping the Word of God before your eyes—teaching you how to live victoriously—so that you are rooted and grounded enough to overcome your own adversity, reach out to others and share those same principles. We endeavor to bring believers from the milk to the meat of the Word, and into full maturity in their walk with God.

programme.title: Today with Marilyn & Sarah
programme.desc: Marilyn& Sarah Ministries is a global, miracle ministry responding to God's callto cover the earth with the Word and connect every one with the heart of God.For nearly 50 years they have empowered ordinary people to tap into thelife-changing power of the gospel through prayer, Bible teaching, humanitarianand evangelistic outreaches, healing meetings, and their daily TV program,Today with Marilyn & Sarah.

programme.title: Breakthrough with Rod Parsley
programme.desc: Breakthrough is the worldwide soul-winning media ministry of Rod Parsley, advancing the kingdom of God around the world through the eye of the camera. Multiplied millions are being challenged to become redemptive agents of change for kingdom advancement in their communities and homes. With practical teaching helping to grow strong Christians, Breakthrough with Rod Parsley makes a significant impact by boldly proclaiming the authority of Jesus Christ to save, heal and transform. Breakthrough with Rod Parsley is committed to reaching this generation with relevant truth to meet the challenges of the real world.

programme.title: Good Morning LIVE
programme.desc: Good Morning LIVE is an engaging 30-minute program designed to inspire, inform, and connect viewers to the heart of meaningful living. Hosted by James Epperly, this dynamic show brings together a unique blend of inspirational devotions, thought-provoking interviews, and discussions on current events that matter most to you. Each episode offers uplifting messages to start your day on a positive note, insightful conversations with special guests, and a closer look at how current events align with faith and personal growth. Whether you're seeking encouragement, knowledge, or a deeper connection to today's world, Good Morning LIVE is your source for faith-filled and relevant content. Join us weekday mornings to experience a fresh perspective, inspired by truth and guided by hope.

programme.title: Joyce Meyer: Enjoying Everyday Life
programme.desc: Joyce Meyer, one of the world’s leading practicalBible teachers and New York Times bestselling author, shares encouragement andadvice to help people enjoy daily life.

programme.title: Gospel Truth with Andrew Wommack
programme.desc: Thirty-two years ago a man had an encounter with God that changed his life forever. Today, he shares that experience with thousands of people all over the world. The goal of Andrew Wommack is to reach as many people as possible with the love of God and message of grace and faith. He doesn’t measure the success of the ministry by the number of tapes distributed, books sold or offerings received. The real rewards, and proof that God is alive and working in people’s lives, are the many testimonies he receives from the people impacted by his teachings. To find out more, please visit our website at: http://www.awmi.net http://www.awmi.net/ www.awmi.net

programme.title: Rick Renner
programme.desc: Rick Renner is widely known for his interpretation of the Greek New Testament and his engaging teaching style. His teaching is punctuated by a unique ability to draw vividly descriptive word pictures from the Greek that illuminate the Scriptures in a fresh, new way. Rick also distinctively shares Bible principles through contemporary illustrations set against an extensive cultural and historical backdrop of New Testament times. In each episode of “Rick Renner,” Rick teaches in-depth on a passage of Scripture verse by verse, centered around a specific theme that is vitally relevant to the lives of believers who are hungry to dig deeper into the treasures of God’s Word. For more information, visit http://www.renner.org.

programme.title: Run The Streets with Debra George
programme.desc: Debra takes you to the darkest streets of America to win souls.

programme.title: The James Epperly Show
programme.desc: "The James Epperly Show" is a Christian television program that aims to inspire and uplift viewers through faith-based content. Hosted by Pastor James Epperly, the show features insightful sermons, engaging interviews with prominent Christian figures, and heartfelt testimonials from individuals who have experienced life-changing transformations through faith. Each episode is designed to offer spiritual guidance, biblical wisdom, and practical advice for living a Christ-centered life. With its friendly and welcoming vibe, 'The James Epperly Show' aims to support viewers' spiritual development and enhance their connection with God, making it a treasured part of their weekly viewing schedule.

programme.title: Manna-fest with Perry Stone
programme.desc: Manna-fest is the weekly television program of Perry Stone that deals with in-depth prophetic and practical studies of the Word of God. As biblical prophecy continues to unfold, you will find Manna-fest to be a resource to help you better understand where we are now in light of Bible prophecy and what the Bible says about the future. Be sure to tune in each week!

programme.title: Worldview Matters
programme.desc: David Fiorazo is an author, ordained pastor, truth proclaimer, media contributor, and podcaster. Since the1990’s David has been working in both TV and radio broadcasting and in Christian ministry. On Worldview Matters, Fiorazo and expert guests tackle current events, demonic agendas &movements, and controversial topics including church & state issues, religious freedom, the culture war, Bible prophecy, education, politics, media& more.

programme.title: The James Epperly Show

programme.title: The Jim Bakker Show
programme.desc: The Jim Bakker Show is an hour-long daily Christian broadcast that is aired throughout the United States, Canada, and the entire world through multiple broadcasts on Pioneer Network, Directv, Dish Network and other world wide satellites, and the PTL Television Network. Join Jim and Lori as they bring to the stage today’s greatest prophets, health experts, and leaders of the Christian world to discuss and understand Biblical prophecy and the Revelations of Gods Word.

programme.title: The Mondo Show
programme.desc: The Mondo Show is real, it’s raw, with an organicfeel to the conversation. Sometimes I will be talking directly to you theaudience, and at other times I will place you in the middle of theconversation, so you can experience what is really being said. The subject matter for the conversation and thequestions will be the things people are afraid to ask, even though it is whateveryone is thinking. I want you to meet the men and women who are making adifference in our communities, in our culture, and in our lives. It’s a journeyto understand the misunderstood. It’s The Mondo Show.

programme.title: Paula Today with Paula White-Cain
programme.desc: Paula Today Paula White-Cain along with her husband, Jonathan Cain discuss real life situations and offer practical, Biblical solutions. Down-to-earth, refreshing, sometimes unfiltered and always sharing the life-changing love of Jesus thru Paula’s in-depth teaching or Jon’s anointed music. About Paula Paula White-Cain is the President of Paula White Ministries and City of Destiny headquartered in Apopka, Florida, and the spiritual advisor to President Donald Trump. She hosts Paula Today, a nationally syndicated daily broadcast reaching a potential audience of 5.7 billion people in over 200 countries. She is a leading Pastor, a renowned life coach, bestselling author, and highly sought-after motivational speaker. Paula’s commitment to humanity is felt worldwide as she reaches out through numerous charities and compassion ministries, fulfilling her mission and call to transform lives, heal hearts and win souls. She lives in the Orlando area with her husband, Jonathan Cain.

programme.title: Focus On The Family

programme.title: The Counter Culture Mom Show
programme.desc: Former Hollywood actress, pop culture expert, Tina Griffin, left her Wisconsin dairy farm at the age of 20 and headed to Hollywood, CA to earn a BA in Film and Television broadcasting from California State University - Los Angeles. She’s traveled globally for the past 20 years delivering her eye-opening show, Hollywood Exposed https://counterculturemom.com/adult-session/ , explaining the real agenda behind the entertainment industry and its impact on the foundational development of today’s youth. Besides being in countless movies, Tina has worked on TV shows such as Jimmy Kimmel Live!, Young and the Restless, Days of Our Lives, Lizzie McGuire, Drake and Josh, and Malcolm in the Middle, competed in the Miss America pageant and worked at the OSCARS. She was involved with the Film Society as well as Women in Film and an active member of the Screen Actors Guild (SAG) and the American Federation of Television and Radio Artists (AFTRA). She has opened for bands such as Colton Dixon, Third Day, and Jeremy Camp. As host of The Counter Culture Mom Show, Tina gives the latest pop culture news and features experts covering critical topics such as cutting, suicide, bullying, online chat room d

programme.title: FlashPoint
programme.desc: Live program that addresses current events and issues facing America and the world. Often tackling topics that mainstream media does not, it delivers news and commentary under the anointing—encouraging evidence that God is indeed working to bring about His plans and purposes during these turbulent times. Hosted by Gene Bailey and joined by leaders in government, business, politics and the Church. FlashPoint’s rapidly become a trusted source of truth and hope. Wednesdays and Fridays at 8 p.m. ET/7 p.m. CT.

programme.title: Breakthrough with Rod Parsley
programme.desc: Breakthrough is the worldwide soul-winning media ministry of Rod Parsley, advancing the kingdom of God around the world through the eye of the camera. Multiplied millions are being challenged to become redemptive agents of change for kingdom advancement in their communities and homes. With practical teaching helping to grow strong Christians, Breakthrough with Rod Parsley makes a significant impact by boldly proclaiming the authority of Jesus Christ to save, heal and transform. Breakthrough with Rod Parsley is committed to reaching this generation with relevant truth to meet the challenges of the real world.

programme.title: The James Epperly Show
programme.desc: "The James Epperly Show" is a Christian television program that aims to inspire and uplift viewers through faith-based content. Hosted by Pastor James Epperly, the show features insightful sermons, engaging interviews with prominent Christian figures, and heartfelt testimonials from individuals who have experienced life-changing transformations through faith. Each episode is designed to offer spiritual guidance, biblical wisdom, and practical advice for living a Christ-centered life. With its friendly and welcoming vibe, 'The James Epperly Show' aims to support viewers' spiritual development and enhance their connection with God, making it a treasured part of their weekly viewing schedule.

programme.title: Good Morning LIVE
programme.desc: Good Morning LIVE is an engaging 30-minute program designed to inspire, inform, and connect viewers to the heart of meaningful living. Hosted by James Epperly, this dynamic show brings together a unique blend of inspirational devotions, thought-provoking interviews, and discussions on current events that matter most to you. Each episode offers uplifting messages to start your day on a positive note, insightful conversations with special guests, and a closer look at how current events align with faith and personal growth. programme.title: Gospel Truth with Andrew Wommack
programme.desc: Thirty-two years ago a man had an encounter with God that changed his life forever. Today, he shares that experience with thousands of people all over the world. The goal of Andrew Wommack is to reach as many people as possible with the love of God and message of grace and faith. He doesn’t measure the success of the ministry by the number of tapes distributed, books sold or offerings received. The real rewards, and proof that God is alive and working in people’s lives, are the many testimonies he receives from the people impacted by his teachings. To find out more, please visit our website at: http://www.awmi.net http://www.awmi.net/ www.awmi.net

programme.title: Rick Renner
programme.desc: Rick Renner is widely known for his interpretation of the Greek New Testament and his engaging teaching style. His teaching is punctuated by a unique ability to draw vividly descriptive word pictures from the Greek that illuminate the Scriptures in a fresh, new way. Rick also distinctively shares Bible principles through contemporary illustrations set against an extensive cultural and historical backdrop of New Testament times. In each episode of “Rick Renner,” Rick teaches in-depth on a passage of Scripture verse by verse, centered around a specific theme that is vitally relevant to the lives of believers who are hungry to dig deeper into the treasures of God’s Word. For more information, visit http://www.renner.org.

She lives in the Orlando area with her husband, Jonathan Cain.
